title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 507.160 - Bond filed, where
text:
507.160.  Bond filed, where. — Such bond shall be delivered to such officer before the appointment shall be made, and shall be filed in the office of the clerk of the court in which the suit is to be brought.
(RSMo 1939 § 864) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 713; 1919 § 1170; 1909 § 1744
